searchQueries.title: Search queries
searchQueries.description: Job search terms. Each generates a separate search.

location.title: Location
location.description: Job location filter. Examples: Brazil, United States, Portugal

datePosted.description: Filter jobs by how recently they were posted.

maxResultsPerQuery.title: Max results per query
maxResultsPerQuery.description: Maximum number of jobs to process per search query
